## 1. Architecture Overview

### Production Stack

| Component | Technology | Runtime | Port | Process Manager |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Go API server | Go 1.25 (Gin, GORM) | Native binary | 8080 | systemd `viecz-server` |
| Web client | Angular 21 SSR (Express 5) | Node.js v24.11 | 4001 | systemd `viecz-web` |
| Jellyfish bot | Python (discord.py, FastAPI) | uv | 8000 | systemd `jellyfish` |
| PostgreSQL | postgres:15-alpine | Docker | 5432 | docker-compose |
| Meilisearch | getmeili/meilisearch:v1.16 | Docker | 7701 | docker-compose |
| Reverse proxy | Caddy 2 | System package | 443/80 | systemd `caddy` |

### Network Topology

```
┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  Production Server (baremetal-sg-ks3)                     │
│                                                          │
│  ┌────────────────────────────────────────────────┐      │
│  │  Caddy (:443 TLS)                              │      │
│  │  viecz.fishcmus.io.vn                          │      │
│  │                                                │      │
│  │  /api/*      → localhost:8080 (Go API)         │      │
│  │  /uploads/*  → disk (static files)             │      │
│  │  /*          → localhost:4001 (Angular SSR)     │      │
│  └────────────────────────────────────────────────┘      │
│                                                          │
│  ┌────────────────────────────────────────────────┐      │
│  │  Caddy (:443 TLS)                              │      │
│  │  viecz-api.fishcmus.io.vn                      │      │
│  │  /*          → localhost:8080 (Go API)          │      │
│  └────────────────────────────────────────────────┘      │
│                                                          │
│  ┌──────────────┐  ┌──────────────┐  ┌──────────────┐   │
│  │ server-linux  │  │ Angular SSR  │  │ Jellyfish    │   │
│  │ (systemd)     │  │ (systemd)    │  │ (systemd)    │   │
│  │ :8080         │  │ :4001        │  │ :8000        │   │
│  └──────┬───────┘  └──────────────┘  └──────────────┘   │
│         │                                                │
│  ┌──────▼───────┐  ┌──────────────┐                      │
│  │ PostgreSQL   │  │ Meilisearch  │                      │
│  │ (Docker)     │  │ (Docker)     │                      │
│  │ :5432        │  │ :7701        │                      │
│  └──────────────┘  └──────────────┘                      │
└──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

### Domains

| Domain | Purpose | TLS |
|---|---|---|
| `viecz.fishcmus.io.vn` | Web client + API (via Caddy) | Caddy auto-TLS |
| `viecz-api.fishcmus.io.vn` | API-only (for Android/mobile clients) | Caddy auto-TLS |

---

## 2. Local Development Setup

Local development uses a **completely different configuration strategy** from production. The test server hardcodes most values, the web client bakes config into TypeScript files at build time, and the Android app reads from a gitignored `local.properties` file. No `.env` files are shared between components.

### Development Architecture

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  docker-compose.testdb.yml                                          │
│    PostgreSQL  → 127.0.0.1:5433  (user: postgres, pass: testpass)  │
│    Meilisearch → 127.0.0.1:7700  (no auth, dev mode)               │
│    Mailpit     → 127.0.0.1:1025 (SMTP) + :8025 (Web UI)           │
│    All use tmpfs — data wiped on container restart                   │
└──────────────────────┬──────────────────────────────────────────────┘
                       │ hardcoded connection strings
┌──────────────────────▼──────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  Go test server  (server/cmd/testserver/main.go)                    │
│    Port: 9999 (hardcoded, binds 0.0.0.0)                           │
│    NO .env loading — all config hardcoded in source                 │
│    Requires: server/firebase-service-account.json                   │
└──────────────────────┬──────────────────────────────────────────────┘
                       │
          ┌────────────┼────────────────┐
          │            │                │
          ▼            ▼                ▼
┌─────────────┐  ┌──────────────┐  ┌──────────────────────┐
│ Angular dev  │  │ Android dev  │  │ Go main server       │
│ (ng serve)   │  │ (devDebug)   │  │ (cmd/server)         │
│ :4200        │  │              │  │ :8080                │
│              │  │ API_BASE_URL │  │                      │
│ proxy.conf   │  │ from local.  │  │ Loads server/.env    │
│ → :9999      │  │ properties   │  │ via godotenv         │
│              │  │ → :9999      │  │ (non-production only)│
│ Config baked │  │              │  │                      │
│ in env.ts    │  │ Keys from    │  │ Copy .env.example    │
│ (no .env)    │  │ build.gradle │  │ → .env, set secrets  │
└─────────────┘  └──────────────┘  └──────────────────────┘
```

### How Each Component Loads Config in Dev

| Component | Config mechanism | `.env` file? | What's hardcoded? |
|---|---|---|---|
| **Go test server** | Hardcoded in `main.go` | No | Everything: DB, JWT, port, PayOS mock, email |
| **Go main server** | `godotenv.Load()` → `server/.env` | Yes (`server/.env`) | Nothing — reads all from env |
| **Angular web** | `environment.ts` (TypeScript) | No `.env` at all | API URLs, Turnstile key, MapTiler, Sentry DSN, Firebase |
| **Android** | `local.properties` → `BuildConfig` | No (uses properties file) | Defaults in `build.gradle.kts` for all keys |

### Quick Start (Recommended: Test Server)

```bash
# 1. Start test containers (PostgreSQL + Meilisearch + Mailpit)
docker compose -f docker-compose.testdb.yml up -d

# 2. Start Go test server (port 9999, all config hardcoded)
cd server
go build -o bin/testserver ./cmd/testserver
./bin/testserver

# 3. Start Angular dev server (port 4200, proxies /api to :9999)
cd web
bun install
bun start    # ng serve with proxy.conf.json

# 4. For Android:
cd android
./gradlew installDevDebug
# Emulator: works out of the box (10.0.2.2:9999)
# Physical device: adb reverse tcp:9999 tcp:9999
```

No `.env` files needed — the test server hardcodes everything.

### Alternative: Main Go Server (port 8080)

If you need to run the full production server locally (e.g., to test production config, OAuth, real PayOS):

```bash
# 1. Start dev PostgreSQL (port 5432)
docker compose -f docker-compose.yml up -d

# 2. Create server/.env from template
cp server/.env.example server/.env
# Edit server/.env: set a real JWT_SECRET (min 32 chars)
# Optionally set: PAYOS_*, GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID, SMTP_*, etc.

# 3. Run
cd server
go run cmd/server/main.go
```

`config.Load()` calls `godotenv.Load()` which reads `server/.env` from the working directory. This **only happens when `GO_ENV` is not `production`** — in production, the systemd unit loads `.env` via `EnvironmentFile=`.

### Dev Environment Variables by Component

#### Go Test Server (hardcoded, no config needed)

| Setting | Hardcoded Value |
|---|---|
| Port | `9999` |
| JWT Secret | `e2e-test-secret-key` |
| DB Host:Port | `localhost:5433` |
| DB Name | `viecz_test` |
| DB Password | `testpass` |
| SMTP | `localhost:1025` (Mailpit, no auth) |
| PayOS | Mock — auto-completes deposits (10s), auto-approves payouts |
| Google OAuth | Mock client ID `test-google-client-id` |
| CORS | `*` (open) |
| Wallet seed | 100,000 VND for new registrations |
| Payout poller | Every 5s |
| DB reset | Drops all tables on startup |

Only these are read from env vars (with defaults):
- `SENTRY_DSN` — defaults to GlitchTip DSN
- `MEILISEARCH_URL` — defaults to `http://localhost:7700`
- `GOOGLE_MAPS_SERVER_KEY` — optional
- `NOMINATIM_URL` — defaults to `http://127.0.0.1:8085`

Requires `server/firebase-service-account.json` on disk (fatal if missing).

#### Go Main Server (`server/.env`)

Copy `server/.env.example` → `server/.env`. Minimal changes needed:

```bash
# server/.env (minimum viable)
PORT=8080
GO_ENV=development
CLIENT_URL=http://localhost:4200
DB_HOST=localhost
DB_PORT=5432
DB_USER=postgres
DB_PASSWORD=postgres
DB_NAME=viecz
DB_SSLMODE=disable
JWT_SECRET=<run: openssl rand -base64 32>
```

Everything else (PayOS, SMTP, Meilisearch, Firebase, Turnstile, Google OAuth) is optional — features are disabled when their env vars are empty.

#### Angular Web Client (no `.env` — baked in TypeScript)

All config lives in `web/src/app/environments/environment.ts`:

| Key | Dev Value | How to Change |
|---|---|---|
| `apiUrl` | `http://localhost:9999/api/v1` | Edit the TS file |
| `wsUrl` | `ws://localhost:9999/api/v1/ws` | Edit the TS file |
| `turnstileSiteKey` | `__TURNSTILE_SITE_KEY__` | Edit the TS file |
| `mapTilerApiKey` | `__MAPTILER_API_KEY__` | Edit the TS file |
| `sentryDsn` | GlitchTip URL | Edit the TS file |
| `firebase` | Firebase project config | Edit the TS file |

The dev server also uses `web/proxy.conf.json` to proxy `/api` and `/ws` to `localhost:9999`.

**There are no `.env` files for the web client.** Changing config requires editing the TypeScript source.

#### Android (`local.properties` — gitignored)

`android/local.properties` is read by `build.gradle.kts` and injected as `BuildConfig` fields:

```properties
# android/local.properties (optional — all have defaults)
API_BASE_URL_DEV=http://10.0.2.2:9999/api/v1/
API_BASE_URL_PROD=https://viecz-api.fishcmus.io.vn/api/v1/
GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID=
SENTRY_DSN=https://__GLITCHTIP_DSN_ANDROID__@glitchtip.fishcmus.io.vn/3
MAPTILER_API_KEY=__MAPTILER_API_KEY__
```

All keys have sensible defaults in `build.gradle.kts` — you can build and run without creating `local.properties` at all. The only required gitignored file for dev builds is `android/app/google-services.json` (Firebase config).

### Test Containers (`docker-compose.testdb.yml`)

| Service | Container | Port | Credentials | Storage |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| PostgreSQL 15 | `viecz-testdb` | `127.0.0.1:5433` | user `postgres`, pass `testpass`, db `viecz_test` | tmpfs (RAM) |
| Meilisearch v1.16 | `viecz-meilisearch` | `127.0.0.1:7700` | No auth, dev mode | tmpfs (RAM) |
| Mailpit | `viecz-mailpit` | `127.0.0.1:1025` (SMTP), `127.0.0.1:8025` (Web UI) | No auth | N/A |

All data is ephemeral — wiped on container restart. The test server drops and re-creates all tables on each startup anyway.

### Mailpit (Email Testing)

Mailpit captures all outgoing emails. Open `http://localhost:8025` to view them in a web UI. Used by both the test server (hardcoded) and the main server (when `SMTP_HOST=localhost`, `SMTP_PORT=1025`).

### Dev vs Production — Key Differences

| Aspect | Development | Production |
|---|---|---|
| Go server config | `.env` file via godotenv (main) or hardcoded (test) | `EnvironmentFile=` in systemd unit |
| Web client config | `environment.ts` (committed) | `environment.prod.ts` (committed, relative URLs) |
| Android config | `local.properties` (gitignored) | Same `local.properties` + `keystore.properties` for signing |
| Database | Docker tmpfs, port 5433 | Docker persistent volume, port 5432 |
| Email | Mailpit (captures, doesn't send) | Real SMTP (Stalwart) |
| PayOS | Mock (auto-completes) | Real PayOS API |
| TLS | None (localhost HTTP) | Caddy auto-TLS |
| Process manager | Terminal / manual | systemd |
| DB lifecycle | Dropped on every test server restart | Persistent, auto-migrated |

---

## 3. Production Deployment

All production services run as **systemd units** on a bare-metal server. PostgreSQL and Meilisearch run in Docker containers. Caddy handles TLS and reverse proxying.

### Prerequisites

- Ubuntu 22.04+ (bare-metal or VM)
- Docker and Docker Compose v2
- Caddy 2 (system package)
- Go 1.25+ (development machine, for cross-compilation)
- Node.js v24+ via NVM (on the server)
- `uv` (for Jellyfish Python runtime)
- SSH access to the production server

### Initial Setup (One-Time)

```bash
# 1. Start PostgreSQL + Meilisearch (Docker)
docker compose -f docker-compose.yml up -d

# 2. Create production .env
cp .env.production.example .env
# Edit: set DB_PASSWORD (use `openssl rand -base64 24`), JWT_SECRET, PayOS keys

# 3. Enable and start systemd services
sudo systemctl enable --now viecz-server viecz-web jellyfish

# 4. Configure Caddy (see Section 7)
sudo systemctl enable --now caddy
```

---

## 4. Go Server

### Build

```bash
# Cross-compile for Linux (from dev machine)
cd server
CGO_ENABLED=0 GOOS=linux GOARCH=amd64 go build -ldflags="-s -w" -o bin/server-linux ./cmd/server
```

Key build flags:
- `CGO_ENABLED=0` — pure Go build, no CGO needed (PostgreSQL driver is pure Go)
- `-ldflags="-s -w"` — strip debug symbols, reduce binary size

### Systemd Service

**`/etc/systemd/system/viecz-server.service`**:

```ini
[Unit]
Description=Viecz Go API Server
After=network.target postgresql.service docker.service

[Service]
Type=simple
User=ubuntu
WorkingDirectory=/home/ubuntu/nhannht-projects/viecz
ExecStart=/home/ubuntu/nhannht-projects/viecz/server/bin/server-linux
EnvironmentFile=/home/ubuntu/nhannht-projects/viecz/.env
Restart=always
RestartSec=3
StandardOutput=journal
StandardError=journal
SyslogIdentifier=viecz-server
NoNewPrivileges=true
ProtectSystem=strict
ReadWritePaths=/home/ubuntu/nhannht-projects/viecz/uploads

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target
```

### Deploy / Update

```bash
# 1. Cross-compile
cd server && CGO_ENABLED=0 GOOS=linux GOARCH=amd64 go build -ldflags="-s -w" -o bin/server-linux ./cmd/server

# 2. Rsync to production
rsync -avz bin/server-linux baremetal-sg-ks3:~/nhannht-projects/viecz/server/bin/

# 3. Restart via systemd
ssh baremetal-sg-ks3 "sudo systemctl restart viecz-server"

# 4. Verify
ssh baremetal-sg-ks3 "curl -s http://localhost:8080/api/v1/health"
```

Typical deploy time: **~15s** (build ~5s + rsync ~5s + restart ~5s).

### Startup Behavior

On startup, the server automatically:
1. Loads config from environment variables (via `.env` file)
2. Connects to PostgreSQL
3. Runs GORM `AutoMigrate` (creates/updates tables)
4. Seeds initial data: categories, 2 test users, wallets, 10 sample tasks (`database.SeedData`)
5. Initializes optional services: Sentry, Meilisearch, PayOS, Firebase, Turnstile, Google OAuth
6. Starts WebSocket hub goroutine
7. Starts PayOS payout status poller (every 30s)
8. Listens on `:<PORT>` (default 8080)

**Hard requirement**: `JWT_SECRET` must be set and not equal to placeholder — server exits with error otherwise.

### Key Dependencies (from go.mod)

| Dependency | Version | Purpose |
|---|---|---|
| `gin-gonic/gin` | v1.11.0 | HTTP framework |
| `gorm.io/gorm` | v1.31.1 | ORM |
| `gorm.io/driver/postgres` | v1.6.0 | PostgreSQL driver |
| `golang-jwt/jwt/v5` | v5.3.1 | JWT authentication |
| `gorilla/websocket` | v1.5.3 | WebSocket support |
| `meilisearch/meilisearch-go` | v0.36.1 | Full-text search |
| `payOSHQ/payos-lib-golang/v2` | v2.0.1 | Payment processing |
| `firebase.google.com/go/v4` | v4.19.0 | Phone auth |
| `prometheus/client_golang` | v1.19.1 | Metrics (`/metrics`) |
| `getsentry/sentry-go` | v0.43.0 | Error tracking |
| `wneessen/go-mail` | v0.7.2 | SMTP email |

### Dockerfile (for Full Docker deployment)

Multi-stage Alpine build at `server/Dockerfile`:

```dockerfile
FROM golang:1.25-alpine AS builder
RUN apk add --no-cache git
WORKDIR /app
COPY go.mod go.sum ./
RUN go mod download
COPY . .
RUN CGO_ENABLED=0 GOOS=linux go build -ldflags="-s -w" -o /server ./cmd/server

FROM alpine:3.21
RUN apk add --no-cache ca-certificates tzdata
WORKDIR /app
COPY --from=builder /server .
COPY --from=builder /app/static ./static
EXPOSE 8080
CMD ["./server"]
```

The `static/` directory contains `.well-known/` (Android App Links) and privacy policy files. Final image is ~20 MB.

---

## 5. Angular Web Client

### Prerequisites

- Node.js v24+ (via NVM)
- Bun (package manager, used instead of npm/yarn for builds)

### Build

```bash
cd web
bun install         # Install dependencies
bun run build       # Production build with SSR
```

Output:
- `dist/web/browser/` — Static assets (HTML, JS, CSS) with content hashing
- `dist/web/server/server.mjs` — SSR Node.js server (Express 5 + `@angular/ssr`)

### Systemd Service

**`/etc/systemd/system/viecz-web.service`**:

```ini
[Unit]
Description=Viecz Angular SSR Web Client
After=network.target viecz-server.service

[Service]
Type=simple
User=ubuntu
WorkingDirectory=/home/ubuntu/nhannht-projects/viecz/web
ExecStart=/home/ubuntu/.nvm/versions/node/v24.11.0/bin/node dist/web/server/server.mjs
Environment=PORT=4001
Restart=always
RestartSec=3
StandardOutput=journal
StandardError=journal
SyslogIdentifier=viecz-web

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target
```

### Deploy / Update

```bash
# 1. Build on production server (or rsync dist/ from dev machine)
cd web && bun run build

# 2. Restart via systemd
sudo systemctl restart viecz-web

# 3. Verify
curl -s --max-time 5 -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" https://viecz.fishcmus.io.vn
```

### SSR Server Details (`web/src/server.ts`)

The SSR server is an Express 5 app using `@angular/ssr/node`:

| Route | Behavior |
|---|---|
| `/i18n/*` | Static files, `Cache-Control: no-cache` (no content hashing) |
| `/*` (static) | `dist/web/browser/` with `maxAge: 1y` (hashed filenames) |
| `GET /api/report/pdf` | Puppeteer headless Chromium → renders `/report` → returns PDF attachment |
| `/*` (other) | Angular SSR rendering, `Cache-Control: no-cache, no-store, must-revalidate` |

Port: `process.env['PORT'] || 4001`. Supports PM2 (checks `process.env['pm_id']`).

### Environment Configuration

Files at `web/src/app/environments/`:

| File | `apiUrl` | `wsUrl` | Usage |
|---|---|---|---|
| `environment.ts` | `http://localhost:9999/api/v1` | `ws://localhost:9999/api/v1/ws` | Local dev against test server |
| `environment.prod.ts` | `/api/v1` (relative) | `/api/v1/ws` (relative) | Production (Caddy proxies) |

Both share: `turnstileSiteKey`, `mapTilerApiKey`, `sentryDsn` (GlitchTip), `firebase` config.

### Dev Server Proxy (`proxy.conf.json`)

```json
{
  "/api": { "target": "http://localhost:9999", "secure": false, "changeOrigin": true },
  "/ws":  { "target": "ws://localhost:9999",  "secure": false, "ws": true }
}
```

### Build Budgets

| Type | Warning | Error |
|---|---|---|
| Initial bundle | 500 kB | 1 MB |
| Component styles | 8 kB | 16 kB |

### Key Dependencies

| Dependency | Version | Purpose |
|---|---|---|
| `@angular/*` | ^21.1.0 | Framework |
| `@angular/ssr` | ^21.1.4 | Server-side rendering |
| `express` | ^5.1.0 | SSR HTTP server |
| `three` | 0.182.0 | 3D rendering |
| `angular-three` | 4.0.9 | Angular-Three.js integration |
| `maplibre-gl` | ^5.19.0 | Maps |
| `tailwindcss` | ^4.2.0 | Styling |
| `puppeteer` | ^24.37.5 | PDF generation |
| `firebase` | ^12.9.0 | Firebase auth |
| `@sentry/angular` | ^10.40.0 | Error tracking (GlitchTip) |

---

## 6. Mobile Client (Capacitor)

### Architecture

The mobile app is a Capacitor wrapper that hosts the compiled Angular web app in a WebView. The native Android project is at `mobile/android/` and uses Gradle.

```
mobile/
├── src/               # Angular web source (same as web/)
├── dist/web/          # Compiled Angular app (built by `bun run build`)
├── android/           # Native Android project
│   ├── gradlew
│   └── app/build.gradle.kts
└── capacitor.config.ts  # Capacitor configuration
```

### Build & Deploy

```bash
# 1. Build Angular web app
cd mobile && bun install && bun run build

# 2. Sync Capacitor (copies dist/web/ into Android native project)
bunx cap sync android

# 3. Build native APK
cd mobile/android && ./gradlew assembleDebug

# 4. Install on device/emulator
cd mobile/android && ./gradlew installDebug
```

### Key Points

- **Single codebase**: Same Angular app runs on web (SSR via Express) and mobile (WebView via Capacitor)
- **No Kotlin UI**: All UI is Angular + Tailwind CSS 4. Kotlin code is minimal (Capacitor plugin integration only)
- **Native plugins**: Capacitor provides access to camera, notifications, file storage, etc. via JavaScript Bridge
- **Offline**: Capacitor provides localStorage and file system APIs; full offline support not yet implemented
- **Deep links**: Handled by Capacitor's intent integration with Android

### Prerequisites

- Node.js v24+ (for `bun`)
- Bun (package manager)
- JDK 21
- Android SDK: compileSdk 36, minSdk 30, targetSdk 36
- Gradle (included in project)

### Build Flavors (Gradle)

| Flavor | Application ID | API Base URL | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| `debug` | `com.viecz.viecz.dev` | `http://localhost:8080/api/v1/` (or via `adb reverse`) | Development |
| `release` | `com.viecz.viecz` | `https://viecz-api.fishcmus.io.vn/api/v1/` | Production |

### Versioning

Gradle builds the APK with a version derived from `package.json` version in `mobile/package.json`. Update there for new releases.

### Signing

Release builds require a signing key. Configure via `mobile/android/keystore.properties` (gitignored):

```properties
storeFile=../../viecz-release.jks
storePassword=<password>
keyAlias=viecz
keyPassword=<password>
```

Both `keystore.properties` and `*.jks` are gitignored. Provision manually on dev machines.

### Testing

```bash
# Angular web tests (same as web client)
cd mobile && npx ng test

# Native Android plugin tests (if any)
cd mobile/android && ./gradlew testDebugUnitTest
```

---

## 7. Jellyfish (Discord Bot)

### Systemd Service

**`/etc/systemd/system/jellyfish.service`**:

```ini
[Unit]
Description=Jellyfish Discord Bot + Webhook Server
After=network.target

[Service]
Type=simple
User=ubuntu
WorkingDirectory=/home/ubuntu/nhannht-projects/viecz/jellyfish
ExecStart=/home/ubuntu/.local/bin/uv run python -m jellyfish.main
EnvironmentFile=/home/ubuntu/nhannht-projects/viecz/jellyfish/.env
Restart=unless-stopped
RestartSec=5
StandardOutput=journal
StandardError=journal
SyslogIdentifier=jellyfish

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target
```

Port 8000 (FastAPI). Environment stored in `jellyfish/.env`.

---

## 8. Reverse Proxy (Caddy)

Caddy replaces the earlier nginx setup. Auto-TLS via Let's Encrypt.

### Main Config (`/etc/caddy/Caddyfile`)

```caddy
{
    email nhannht@fishcmus.io.vn
    admin localhost:2019
}

import snippets/*.caddy
import sites/*.caddy
```

### Viecz Web (`/etc/caddy/sites/viecz.caddy`)

```caddy
viecz.fishcmus.io.vn {
    import tls-fishcmus
    request_body { max_size 10MB }

    handle_path /uploads/* {
        root * /home/ubuntu/nhannht-projects/viecz/uploads
        header Cache-Control "public, max-age=31536000, immutable"
        file_server
    }

    handle /api/* {
        reverse_proxy localhost:8080
    }

    handle {
        reverse_proxy localhost:4001
    }
}
```

### Viecz API (`/etc/caddy/sites/viecz-api.caddy`)

```caddy
viecz-api.fishcmus.io.vn {
    import tls-fishcmus
    reverse_proxy localhost:8080
}
```

### Routing Summary

| Path | Destination | Cache |
|---|---|---|
| `/uploads/*` | Static files from disk | 1 year, immutable |
| `/api/*` | Go server :8080 | No cache (dynamic) |
| `/*` | Angular SSR :4001 | No cache (SSR HTML) |

---

## 9. Docker Compose Services

### `docker-compose.yml` — Development PostgreSQL

```yaml
services:
  postgres:
    image: postgres:15-alpine
    container_name: viecz-postgres
    environment:
      POSTGRES_USER: ${DB_USER:-postgres}
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: ${DB_PASSWORD:-postgres}
      POSTGRES_DB: ${DB_NAME:-viecz}
    ports:
      - "127.0.0.1:5432:5432"
    volumes:
      - postgres_data:/var/lib/postgresql/data
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD-SHELL", "pg_isready -U ${DB_USER:-postgres}"]
      interval: 10s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 5
    restart: unless-stopped

volumes:
  postgres_data:
```

### `docker-compose.server.yml` — Full Docker Deployment

Includes Go server (built from Dockerfile), PostgreSQL 16, and Meilisearch:

| Service | Image | Port | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| `server` | Built from `./server/Dockerfile` | `127.0.0.1:8080` | `GO_ENV=production`, mounts `./uploads` and `firebase-credentials.json` |
| `postgres` | `postgres:16-alpine` | `127.0.0.1:5432` | Persistent volume |
| `meilisearch` | `getmeili/meilisearch:v1.16` | `127.0.0.1:7701` | Requires `MEILI_MASTER_KEY` |

### `docker-compose.cloudflared.yml` — Cloudflare Tunnel

```yaml
services:
  cloudflared:
    image: cloudflare/cloudflared:latest
    container_name: viecz-cloudflared
    command: tunnel run --token ${CLOUDFLARED_TOKEN}
    depends_on:
      server:
        condition: service_started
    restart: unless-stopped
```

### `docker-compose.testdb.yml` — Test Environment

| Service | Image | Port | Storage |
|---|---|---|---|
| `postgres` | `postgres:15-alpine` | `127.0.0.1:5433` | tmpfs (ephemeral) |
| `meilisearch` | `getmeili/meilisearch:v1.16` | `127.0.0.1:7700` | tmpfs (ephemeral) |
| `mailpit` | `axllent/mailpit` | SMTP `127.0.0.1:1025`, Web `127.0.0.1:8025` | N/A |

---

## 10. Environment Variables — Complete Reference

### Go Server (from `server/internal/config/config.go`)

#### Core

| Variable | Default | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `PORT` | `8080` | No | Server listen port |
| `GO_ENV` | `development` | No | `development` or `production` (enables Gin release mode) |
| `CLIENT_URL` | `http://localhost:8081` | No | Frontend URL for CORS |
| `PAYOS_RETURN_BASE_URL` | `http://localhost:8080` | No | Base URL for PayOS return callbacks |
| `LOG_LEVEL` | `info` | No | Log level |

#### Database

| Variable | Default | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `DB_HOST` | `localhost` | No | PostgreSQL host |
| `DB_PORT` | `5432` | No | PostgreSQL port |
| `DB_USER` | `postgres` | No | PostgreSQL username |
| `DB_PASSWORD` | `postgres` | No | PostgreSQL password |
| `DB_NAME` | `viecz` | No | PostgreSQL database name |
| `DB_SSLMODE` | `disable` | No | PostgreSQL SSL mode |

#### Authentication

| Variable | Default | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `JWT_SECRET` | — | **Yes** | JWT signing key. Fatal if missing or placeholder value |
| `GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID` | — | No | Google OAuth client ID |
| `GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET` | — | No | Google OAuth client secret |
| `FIREBASE_CREDENTIALS_FILE` | — | No | Path to Firebase service account JSON (phone auth) |
| `TURNSTILE_SECRET_KEY` | — | No | Cloudflare Turnstile secret. Empty = bot validation disabled |

#### Payments (PayOS)

| Variable | Default | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `PAYOS_CLIENT_ID` | — | No | Deposit channel client ID |
| `PAYOS_API_KEY` | — | No | Deposit channel API key |
| `PAYOS_CHECKSUM_KEY` | — | No | Deposit channel checksum key |
| `PAYOS_PAYOUT_CLIENT_ID` | — | No | Payout channel client ID |
| `PAYOS_PAYOUT_API_KEY` | — | No | Payout channel API key |
| `PAYOS_PAYOUT_CHECKSUM_KEY` | — | No | Payout channel checksum key |

#### Financial Limits

| Variable | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `PLATFORM_FEE_RATE` | `0` | Decimal fee rate (e.g. `0.10` = 10%) |
| `MAX_WALLET_BALANCE` | `200000` | Max wallet balance per user (VND) |
| `MIN_WITHDRAWAL_AMOUNT` | `10000` | Minimum withdrawal (VND) |
| `MAX_WITHDRAWAL_AMOUNT` | `200000` | Maximum withdrawal (VND) |

#### Search

| Variable | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `MEILISEARCH_URL` | — | Meilisearch URL. Empty = PostgreSQL LIKE fallback |
| `MEILISEARCH_API_KEY` | — | Meilisearch API key. Empty = no auth |

#### Email (SMTP)

| Variable | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `SMTP_HOST` | — | SMTP server hostname. Empty = email disabled |
| `SMTP_PORT` | `587` | SMTP port |
| `SMTP_USER` | — | SMTP username |
| `SMTP_PASSWORD` | — | SMTP password |
| `SMTP_FROM` | `noreply@fishcmus.io.vn` | Sender email address |

#### Rate Limiting

| Variable | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `RATE_LIMIT_ENABLED` | `false` | Enable rate limiting |
| `RATE_LIMIT_AUTH_PER_MIN` | `10` | Auth endpoint limit per minute |
| `RATE_LIMIT_API_PER_MIN` | `30` | General API limit per minute |
| `RATE_LIMIT_READ_PER_MIN` | `60` | Read endpoint limit per minute |
| `RATE_LIMIT_FINANCE_PER_MIN` | `10` | Finance endpoint limit per minute |

#### Observability

| Variable | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `SENTRY_DSN` | — | Sentry/GlitchTip DSN. Empty = disabled |

#### Geocoding

| Variable | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `GOOGLE_MAPS_SERVER_KEY` | — | Google Maps server API key. Empty = maps proxy disabled |
| `NOMINATIM_URL` | `http://127.0.0.1:8085` | Nominatim geocoding service URL |

### Production Minimal (`.env.production.example`)

| Variable | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `DB_USER` | Yes | PostgreSQL username |
| `DB_PASSWORD` | Yes | PostgreSQL password (use `openssl rand -base64 24`) |
| `DB_NAME` | Yes | PostgreSQL database name |
| `CLIENT_URL` | Yes | Frontend URL for CORS |
| `JWT_SECRET` | Yes | Min 32 chars, random string |
| `CLOUDFLARE_TUNNEL_TOKEN` | Yes | Token from Cloudflare Zero Trust dashboard |

### Android (`local.properties`, gitignored)

| Key | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `API_BASE_URL_DEV` | `http://10.0.2.2:9999/api/v1/` | Dev flavor API URL |
| `API_BASE_URL_PROD` | `https://viecz-api.fishcmus.io.vn/api/v1/` | Prod flavor API URL |
| `GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID` | `""` | Google Sign-In client ID |
| `SENTRY_DSN` | `""` | GlitchTip/Sentry DSN |
| `MAPTILER_API_KEY` | `__MAPTILER_API_KEY__` | MapTiler API key |

### Web Client (`web/src/app/environments/`)

| Key | Dev | Prod | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `apiUrl` | `http://localhost:9999/api/v1` | `/api/v1` | API base URL |
| `wsUrl` | `ws://localhost:9999/api/v1/ws` | `/api/v1/ws` | WebSocket URL |
| `turnstileSiteKey` | `__TURNSTILE_SITE_KEY__` | Same | Cloudflare Turnstile site key |
| `mapTilerApiKey` | `__MAPTILER_API_KEY__` | Same | MapTiler API key |
| `sentryDsn` | GlitchTip URL | Same | Error tracking DSN |
| `firebase` | Firebase config object | Same | Firebase project config |

---

## 11. Test Server (Development / E2E)

The test server (`server/cmd/testserver/main.go`) provides a self-contained environment for local development and E2E testing.

| Property | Value |
|---|---|
| Port | `9999` (hardcoded, binds `0.0.0.0`) |
| Database | PostgreSQL port 5433 (`viecz_test`, password `testpass`) |
| Search | Meilisearch port 7700 (optional, falls back gracefully) |
| Email | Mailpit SMTP port 1025, Web UI port 8025 |
| JWT Secret | `e2e-test-secret-key` (hardcoded) |
| PayOS | Mock — auto-completes deposits (10s delay), auto-approves payouts |
| Firebase | Real Firebase phone auth (if `firebase-service-account.json` exists) |
| Wallet seed | Auto-seeds 100,000 VND for new registrations |
| CORS | `"*"` (open) |
| Payout poller | Every 5s (faster than production's 30s) |
| DB reset | Drops and re-creates all tables on each startup |

### Setup and Run

```bash
# 1. Start test containers
docker compose -f docker-compose.testdb.yml up -d

# 2. Build and run
cd server
go build -o bin/testserver ./cmd/testserver
./bin/testserver
```

### Seed Data

On startup, the test server seeds:
- All categories
- 2 test users: `nhan1@gmail.com`, `nhan2@gmail.com` (password: `Password123`)
- Wallets with 10,000,000 VND each
- 10 sample tasks

### Mock Checkout Page

The test server serves `/mock-checkout/:orderCode` — an HTML page that simulates PayOS checkout and redirects back via Android Intent URI.

### E2E Test Script

`scripts/run-full-e2e.sh` automates the full flow:

```bash
./scripts/run-full-e2e.sh          # Interactive (prompts for device type)
./scripts/run-full-e2e.sh emulator # Emulator mode
./scripts/run-full-e2e.sh device   # Physical device mode
```

Steps: detect device → build testserver → start on :9999 → health check → run Gradle instrumented tests → report results.

### Gradle Test Profiles

```bash
# Mock-only tests (no server needed)
./gradlew connectedDevDebugAndroidTest -PexcludeRealServer
./gradlew connectedMockE2E

# Real-server tests (requires test server on :9999)
./gradlew connectedDevDebugAndroidTest -PonlyRealServer
./gradlew connectedRealServerE2E
```

---

## 12. CI/CD (GitHub Actions)

### Existing Workflows

| Workflow | Trigger | Path Filter | What It Does |
|---|---|---|---|
| `server-tests.yml` | Push/PR to master | `server/**` | golangci-lint, `go test` (60% coverage), govulncheck |
| `web-tests.yml` | Push/PR to master | `web/**` | ESLint, `bunx ng test` (50% coverage), `npm audit` |
| `security.yml` | Push/PR to master | None (all) | Gitleaks secret scanning |

### Missing (Not Yet Implemented)

- **Android CI** — no `android-release.yml` or `android-ci.yml` exists
- **Firebase App Distribution** — configured in Gradle but no automated pipeline
- **Docker image building** — no container registry push workflow
- **Production deployment** — no automated deploy (manual rsync + systemctl)

### Server Tests (`server-tests.yml`)

- Go version: 1.25
- `CGO_ENABLED=1` for tests
- Jobs: lint → test (with coverage artifact upload) → security (govulncheck)

### Web Tests (`web-tests.yml`)

- Uses `oven-sh/setup-bun@v2`
- Jobs: lint (ESLint) → test (`bunx ng test`, 50% statement coverage) → security (`npm audit --audit-level=critical`, non-fatal)

---

## 13. Verify Deployment

### Production

```bash
# Health check (API)
curl -s https://viecz-api.fishcmus.io.vn/api/v1/health

# Health check (web)
curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" https://viecz.fishcmus.io.vn

# Systemd service status
sudo systemctl status viecz-server viecz-web jellyfish

# Docker containers
sudo docker ps

# Go server logs
journalctl -u viecz-server -f

# Web client logs
journalctl -u viecz-web -f

# Database query
sudo docker exec viecz-postgres psql -U postgres -d viecz -c "SELECT count(*) FROM users;"
```

### Test Server

```bash
curl -s http://localhost:9999/api/v1/health
curl -s http://localhost:9999/api/v1/categories
```

---

## 14. Maintenance

### Logs

| Service | Command |
|---|---|
| Go server | `journalctl -u viecz-server -f` |
| Web client | `journalctl -u viecz-web -f` |
| Jellyfish | `journalctl -u jellyfish -f` |
| PostgreSQL | `sudo docker logs viecz-postgres -f` |
| Caddy | `journalctl -u caddy -f` |
| Android app | `adb logcat --pid=$(adb shell pidof com.viecz.vieczandroid.dev)` |

### Service Management

```bash
# Restart individual services
sudo systemctl restart viecz-server
sudo systemctl restart viecz-web
sudo systemctl restart jellyfish
sudo systemctl restart caddy

# Restart PostgreSQL (Docker)
sudo docker restart viecz-postgres

# View service status
sudo systemctl status viecz-server viecz-web jellyfish caddy
```

### Database Backup

```bash
# Dump
sudo docker exec viecz-postgres pg_dump -U postgres viecz > backup_$(date +%Y%m%d).sql

# Restore
sudo docker exec -i viecz-postgres psql -U postgres viecz < backup_20260312.sql
```

### Full Redeploy (All Services)

```bash
# 1. Go server
cd server && CGO_ENABLED=0 GOOS=linux GOARCH=amd64 go build -ldflags="-s -w" -o bin/server-linux ./cmd/server
rsync -avz bin/server-linux baremetal-sg-ks3:~/nhannht-projects/viecz/server/bin/
ssh baremetal-sg-ks3 "sudo systemctl restart viecz-server"

# 2. Web client (on production server)
cd web && bun run build
sudo systemctl restart viecz-web

# 3. Verify
curl -s https://viecz-api.fishcmus.io.vn/api/v1/health
curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" https://viecz.fishcmus.io.vn
```
